contract.name: v2/agency/treasury_account/tas/program_activity.md
contract.description: Returns aggregated program activity totals and their object class breakdowns for a treasury account symbol in a given fiscal year.

tas.description: Treasury Account Symbol identifying the account to query; echoed verbatim in the response even when unknown.
tas.constraints: Required. Case-sensitive. Supports symbols with optional 'X' segment and at most one slash. Unknown values return 200 with empty results.

fiscal_year.constraints: Optional. Defaults to the current fiscal year (observed 2026). Accepts integers from 2008 through the current year inclusive. Requests before FY2017 return 200 with empty results plus a warning message. Values below 2008 or above the current year return 422; non-integers return 400.

filter.description: Documented textual filter for object class names; observed to suppress all results when present.
filter.constraints: Optional. Any supplied value returned 200 with empty results/messages in probes, so callers should not rely on it for filtering.

order.description: Controls sort direction when a sort field is applied.
order.constraints: Optional. Enum ['asc', 'desc']; default 'desc'. Case-sensitive; invalid values return 400.

sort.constraints: Optional. Enum ['name', 'obligated_amount', 'gross_outlay_amount']; default 'obligated_amount'. 'type' is rejected with 400 despite documentation.

page.constraints: Optional. Integer ≥ 1; default 1. Values beyond available pages return 200 with empty results while echoing the requested page.

limit.description: Maximum number of program activities per page.
limit.constraints: Optional. Integer between 1 and 100 inclusive; default 10. Values outside the range return 422 and non-integers return 400.

treasury_account_symbol.description: Echo of the requested TAS string.

fiscal_year.description: Fiscal year actually served (defaults to current year when omitted).

page_metadata.description: Pagination metadata mirroring request inputs and dataset totals.

results.description: List of program activities for the TAS/year.

type.description: Observed values 'PARK' and 'PAC/PAN' depending on fiscal year.

messages.description: Warning strings; observed populated when requesting fiscal years without available data.

messages: Account data powering this endpoint were first collected in FY2017 Q2 under the DATA Act; as such, there are no data available for prior fiscal years.

quirks: Unknown or case-mismatched TAS values return 200 with empty results, so callers must validate symbols externally.
Requested pages beyond available totals return empty results while `page_metadata.page` echoes the requested value and `hasNext` is false.
Sort order is case-sensitive; 'ASC' is rejected with 400.
Program activity `type` toggles between 'PARK' and 'PAC/PAN' depending on fiscal year.
Requests for fiscal years before FY2017 return 200 with empty results and a warning message.
Supplying the `filter` parameter currently suppresses all results.
risks: Clients must distinguish 400 versus 422 validation errors to provide accurate feedback to callers.
Successful responses can contain empty `results` when TAS values or page numbers are invalid, so downstream logic must inspect totals before assuming data is present.
Financial totals are large and may include negative child values; use high-precision numeric handling.
Ignoring `messages` can hide data-availability warnings for older fiscal years.
Depending on `filter` for narrowing results will silently produce empty payloads.

probes.notes: pass: default call returns three program activities for FY 2026
pass: fiscal_year=2023 succeeds and flips program activity type to PAC/PAN
pass: page beyond total yields empty results but metadata echoes requested page
fail: API rejects sort=type despite docs listing it
fail: `filter` parameter returned empty data in all trials

response.bodyExcerpt: {"treasury_account_symbol":"075-X-0512-000","fiscal_year":2008,"page_metadata":{"page":1,"total":0,"limit":10,"next":null,"previous":null,"hasNext":false,"hasPrevious":false},"results":[],"messages":["Account data powering this endpoint were first collected in FY2017 Q2 under the DATA Act; as such, there are no data available for prior fiscal years."]}

probes.notes: pass: fiscal_year=2008 returns empty results with a warning message

mismatches: Documentation lists 'type' as a valid `sort` option, but the API returns 400 with the valid set ['name','obligated_amount','gross_outlay_amount'].
Documentation describes `filter` as narrowing by object class name, yet every tested value returned 200 with empty results.
risks: Differentiating 400 versus 422 responses is necessary to expose accurate validation feedback to users.
Empty `results` payloads occur for bad TAS, suppressed filters, or out-of-range pages even when the HTTP status is 200.
Numeric fields can exceed typical 32-bit ranges and include negatives, requiring high-precision handling.
Warning messages communicate data gaps for older fiscal years; ignoring them can mislead reporting.
Depending on the `filter` parameter will silently drop all data until the service restores its intended behavior.
